summary: The implementation covers all 9 requirements with comprehensive frontend and backend functionality. The diff shows a complete student management platform with Internet Identity authentication, role-based access control, student registration, profile management, course enrollment, attendance tracking, test results, and admin dashboards. The warm color theme is implemented via CSS custom properties. All core features are present in the codebase.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile setup screen (UserProfileSetup.tsx) requiring users to enter their name after authentication
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify a user profile setup step after authentication. Students should be able to register directly or access features after login without an intermediate profile setup screen.

hallucinated_features.description: Dark mode color scheme definitions in CSS
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-9 specifies a warm, welcoming color scheme for education but does not mention dark mode support or alternate color schemes.
